message:
fix(install): use correct Claude Code hook matcher format

The Claude Code hooks system now requires the matcher to be an object
with a "tools" array rather than a simple string. This updates:

- Python merger to recognize both old string and new object formats
- Entry creation to use the new object format
- New file template to use the new object format

Old format: "matcher": "Bash"
New format: "matcher": {"tools": ["Bash"]}

The merger now handles migration from old format to new format
automatically when consolidating hooks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
